title: decadent gooey mediterranean mascarpone galette
description: a rich and gooey dessert featuring mascarpone, crispy philo, and the flavors of the mediterranean. perfect for a festive evening.
instructions: wrap the phyllo dough in plastic wrap and let it thaw at room temperature for 30 minutes.
in a medium bowl, whisk together the mascarpone cheese, egg yolks, honey, orange blossom water, and ground cinnamon.
unroll the phyllo dough and cut it into 12 equal squares.
brush the phyllo squares with melted butter and arrange 4 squares in a circular pattern on a baking sheet.
spread a quarter of the mascarpone mixture on top of the phyllo squares, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
top with another 4 phyllo squares and brush with melted butter.
repeat the layers two more times, ending with a phyllo square on top.
brush the top phyllo square with melted butter and sprinkle with chopped thyme.
bake the galette for 25-30 minutes, or until the phyllo is golden brown and the filling is set.
remove the galette from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
transfer the galette to a serving plate and let it cool completely.
